title: METRO Vic's Point Blank
description: The pack for Vic's Point Blank for the Metro series of games
body: ![metro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fed93f01c0593cf06e0de053beb4dbf2301619c4.png) The pack for Vic's Point Blank for the Metro series of games is still in development and was created alone, I'm waiting for your comments on what I can fix in it. Adds a lot of weapons and modifiers to them. My pack adds 23 weapons from metro and this is not the end, I want to add all the weapons from metro 2033, metro last light, metro exodus, as well as fan weapons from the Internet. Мой дискорд сервер [https://discord.gg/YVen3vjnGT](https://discord.gg/YVen3vjnGT)
